title: Verify trusted calendar window semantics
preconditions: A controllable TimeProvider and representative leap-year, month-boundary, Monday/Sunday, historical, current, and future periods are available.
steps: Freeze instants around local midnight and period boundaries; derive day, Monday-week, and month-to-date windows; exercise leap day, historical period, future period, host locale changes, and rolling-window input.
expected: Africa/Johannesburg calendar bounds, clipping, Not Started, full historical month, Effective Date membership, and Unsupported Analysis Window exactly match FR-INSIGHTS-TRUSTED-ANALYSIS-WINDOWS.
